sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Amphastar Pharmaceuticals Highlights Baqsimi Milestones, Primatene Growth at Needham Conference
feed.summary: Amphastar Pharmaceuticals provided updates on its growth drivers and pipeline at the Needham conference. The company expects Baqsimi sales to hit $175 million this year, triggering a significant milestone payment, despite some pricing pressure. Primatene Mist is projected for high single to low double-digit growth, while Amphastar also plans for new launches, including AMP-007 in early Q2 and key diabetes biosimilars in 2027.

feed.title: Astera Labs (ALAB) CEO-linked trust sells 123,750 shares under 10b5-1 plan
feed.summary: A living trust associated with Astera Labs CEO Mohan Jitendra sold 123,750 shares of Common Stock in open-market transactions on April 10, 2026. These sales, totaling approximately $18.52 million, were executed automatically under a Rule 10b5-1 trading plan adopted on December 1, 2025. After the transactions, the living trust indirectly holds 4,407,982 shares, and Mr. Jitendra also has direct and other indirect holdings through various estate planning trusts.

feed.title: Woodward to sell pilot controls unit to Ontic Engineering
feed.summary: Woodward, Inc. announced an agreement to sell its pilot controls product line and associated services to Ontic Engineering and Manufacturing. This strategic move aims to optimize Woodward's portfolio and focus on core growth areas, while Ontic will provide product support expertise. The deal, subject to customary conditions, includes a long-term supply arrangement where Woodward will remain the sole supplier of certain electromechanical components for pilot controls.

feed.title: Woodward exits pilot controls, keeps parts supply in Ontic deal
feed.summary: Woodward (NASDAQ: WWD) has announced an agreement to sell its pilot controls product line to Ontic Engineering and Manufacturing, including throttle quadrant assemblies, rudder pedals, and passive side sticks. This move aligns with Woodward's strategy to optimize its portfolio and focus on core growth areas in aerospace. As part of the deal, Woodward will continue to be the sole supplier of certain electromechanical components and will provide transition services for 9-12 months.

feed.title: IQVIA to Announce First-Quarter 2026 Results on May 5, 2026
feed.summary: IQVIA Holdings Inc. will announce its first-quarter 2026 financial results before market open on Tuesday, May 5, 2026. The management team will also host a conference call and webcast at 9:00 a.m. Eastern Time on the same day. Details for accessing the earnings release, webcast, and conference call registration are available on the IQVIA Investor Relations website.

feed.title: Escondido Apple Store closing in June
feed.summary: The Apple Store located inside the North County Mall in Escondido is slated for closure in June. Apple cited the mall's "declining conditions" and the departure of other retailers as reasons for the closure. Employees from the Escondido store will be relocated to other nearby Apple Store locations, as Apple is also closing two other stores nationwide.

feed.title: Is It Too Late To Consider U.S. Bancorp (USB) After Its Strong One-Year Rally?
feed.summary: U.S. Bancorp (USB) has seen a strong rally over the past year. This article analyzes USB's current valuation using an Excess Returns model and a Price vs. Earnings approach, suggesting the stock might still be undervalued despite recent gains. The discussion provides insights into whether its current share price aligns with underlying fundamentals.

feed.title: Olympia Financial Group Inc. Announces Closing of Previously Announced Sale of Olympia Currency and Global Payments Inc.
feed.summary: Olympia Financial Group Inc. (TSX: OLY) announced the closing of the sale of Olympia Currency and Global Payments Inc. to Shift Connect Ltd. This follows their previous announcement on March 16, 2026. Olympia Financial Group Inc. operates primarily through its subsidiary Olympia Trust Company, administering self-directed registered plan accounts and offering various financial services.

feed.title: Capra Bank again named fastest-growing bank in nation
feed.summary: Capra Bank has been recognized as the fastest-growing bank in the nation for every year of its existence, according to a Raymond James peer growth analysis. The bank achieved this distinction through entirely organic growth, ranking #1 in asset growth (296%) and loan growth (411%) from 2023 to 2025, and also surpassed $1 billion in assets faster than any other bank in history. Despite its rapid expansion, Capra Bank maintains strong financial performance with $1.23 billion in assets as of Q1 2026, a Return on Average Assets of ~1.3%, and an efficiency ratio of 55%.

feed.title: Book value per share of Novartis AG ADR Cert Deposito Arg Repr 0.25 ADRs – BCBA:NVSC
feed.summary: This article provides access to the book value per share for Novartis AG ADR Cert Deposito Arg Repr 0.25 ADRs (BCBA:NVSC) on the Buenos Aires Stock Exchange through TradingView. It directs users to the financial data section for the company.

feed.title: ESCO Technologies Hits New 52-Week High of $315.18, Soars 193%
feed.summary: ESCO Technologies, Inc. has reached a new 52-week high of $315.18, showcasing remarkable performance in the electronics and appliances sector with a 193.26% increase over the past year. The company boasts a market capitalization of USD 8,121 million, a low debt-to-equity ratio of 0.03, and a high dividend yield of 12.78%, indicating strong financial stability and commitment to shareholders. This achievement significantly outpaces the S&P 500's growth during the same period.

feed.title: Via Renewables, Inc. Announces Dividend on Preferred Stock
feed.summary: Via Renewables, Inc. announced a quarterly cash dividend of $0.65704 per share on its 8.75% Series A Fixed-to-Floating Rate Cumulative Redeemable Perpetual Preferred Stock. This dividend will be paid on July 15, 2026, to shareholders of record as of July 1, 2026. The company also noted that following the end of Three-Month LIBOR, the replacement benchmark rate for the Series A Preferred Stock is Three-Month CME Term SOFR.

feed.title: Valley Bank expands commercial banking into Arizona
feed.summary: Valley Bank is expanding its commercial banking operations into Arizona, establishing a new C&I-focused team in Phoenix. This move is part of the bank's strategy to target high-growth markets across the U.S. and builds on its existing presence through Dudley Ventures. The expansion aims to serve middle-market companies in the Southwest, reflecting a broader growth strategy that also includes recent leadership appointments in small business banking.

feed.title: Ross Bhappu to Take Over as CEO of Energy Fuels as Company Enters Next Phase of Growth
feed.summary: Energy Fuels Inc. announced the appointment of Ross R. Bhappu as its new Chief Executive Officer, effective April 15, 2026. Mr. Bhappu, who has served as President since August 2025, succeeds Mark S. Chalmers, who is retiring after over eight years as CEO but will continue as a consultant for two years. This transition marks a new phase for Energy Fuels as it plans significant growth initiatives, including mine permitting, expansion of the White Mesa Mill, and an acquisition to expand into REE metal and alloy making.

feed.title: DTCC makes public cloud move with AWS and Microsoft
feed.summary: The Depository Trust & Clearing Corporation (DTCC) is partnering with AWS and Microsoft to migrate its core market and digital market infrastructure to the public cloud. This initiative aims to modernize core clearance and settlement systems and risk applications, enhancing operational resilience and supporting the adoption of advanced AI capabilities. DTCC will use AWS for its core systems and expand its partnership with Microsoft for its digital assets business, including migrating Digital Launchpad to Azure.

feed.title: Jury finds that Ticketmaster and Live Nation had an anticompetitive monopoly over big concert venues
authors: LARRY NEUMEISTER and JENNIFER PELTZ — Associated Press
feed.summary: A jury has found that Live Nation and its Ticketmaster subsidiary operated an anticompetitive monopoly over big concert venues, delivering a significant loss to the company in a lawsuit brought by numerous U.S. states. The verdict could result in hundreds of millions of dollars in damages, including overcharges to consumers, and potentially lead to the divestment of some of Live Nation's entities. This case is seen as a landmark victory for antitrust law and state Attorneys General, setting a precedent for future actions against monopolies.

feed.title: Lockheed Martin Secures $850M Contract Modification for TRIDENT II Program
feed.summary: Lockheed Martin Space has secured an $850.41 million contract modification for the TRIDENT II (D5) Life Extension 2 program, reinforcing its strong position in the defense sector. The work is scheduled for completion by September 30, 2030, with funding secured from FY2026 U.S. Navy weapons procurement funds. This contract highlights Lockheed Martin's continued leadership in critical defense projects, potentially leading to further opportunities.

feed.title: Astera Labs (NASDAQ: ALAB) insider transfer notice lists 204,750 RSU shares
feed.summary: Astera Labs (NASDAQ: ALAB) insider Jitendra Mohan and a related trust have filed a Form 144 notice detailing proposed transfers of 204,750 RSU shares, dated December 1, 2025. The filing also reports three completed sales in the past three months, totaling 376,221 shares with significant gross proceeds. This neutral filing informs the market about planned and recent insider transactions involving restricted stock units.

feed.title: CRA International (CRAI) EVP exercises RSUs with tax withholding and retains large stake
feed.summary: CRA International's EVP and Chief Corporate Development Officer, Chad M. Holmes, exercised restricted stock units (RSUs) totaling 1,006.674 shares. A portion of these shares, 460, was withheld for tax obligations at $163.80 per share. Following these transactions, Holmes directly holds 46,431 shares of common stock and retains various unvested RSU and stock option awards.

feed.title: CVS Health Outperforms XWELL in Financial Metrics
feed.summary: CVS Health is shown to be a stronger stock than XWELL, boasting higher revenue, earnings, and institutional ownership, along with a more favorable consensus rating and greater upside potential from analysts. The analysis highlights CVS Health's significant advantages in scale, profitability, institutional backing, and market confidence, making it a more attractive and lower-risk investment option in the healthcare sector.

feed.title: Westport Provides Bi-Weekly Management Cease Trade Order Status Update
feed.summary: Westport Fuel Systems Inc. (TSX: WPRT Nasdaq: WPRT) has issued its bi-weekly management cease trade order (MCTO) status report, prompted by a delay in filing its annual financial statements due to a cybersecurity incident. The company confirms that the cyber investigation is concluded and internal controls were not deficient. Westport aims to file its Annual Filings as soon as possible and continues to provide bi-weekly updates.

feed.title: Southwest Airlines Names Former Hilton Exec as Its First Chief Digital & Marketing Officer
feed.summary: Southwest Airlines has appointed Sabrina Callahan, formerly of Hilton, Walmart, and AT&T, as its first Chief Digital & Marketing Officer. In this new role, Callahan will lead Southwest's marketing and digital strategy to deepen customer relationships and grow the customer base as the airline expands into new markets. Her primary focus will be to unify marketing with digital platforms to enhance brand interactions and ensure a consistent customer experience.

feed.title: New York City taps Willdan for $27M building emissions program
feed.summary: Willdan Group, Inc. (NASDAQ: WLDN) has secured a $27 million, three-year contract with the New York City Mayor’s Office of Climate & Environmental Justice. The contract involves redesigning and implementing the NYC Accelerator program, which aims to help building owners reduce greenhouse gas emissions and comply with Local Law 97. Willdan is collaborating with eight local firms to shift the program's focus from energy awareness to project implementation, fostering green jobs and energy efficiency in New York City.

feed.title: Yum! Brands Announces Q1 2026 Earnings and Conference Call Details
feed.summary: Yum! Brands, Inc. (NYSE: YUM) will release its first-quarter financial results on Wednesday, April 29, 2026, at 7:00 a.m. ET, followed by a conference call at 8:15 a.m. ET. The conference call details, including dial-in numbers and a webcast link, are provided for analysts and the public. The company, based in Louisville, Kentucky, operates over 63,000 KFC, Taco Bell, Pizza Hut, and Habit Burger & Grill restaurants globally.

feed.title: A Look at FactSet Research Systems Inc (FDS) After 3.2% Gain -- GF Value $499.19 vs Price $230.75
feed.summary: FactSet Research Systems Inc (FDS) shares rose 3.2% to $230.75, significantly below its GF Value™ of $499.19, indicating it is substantially undervalued with a 53.8% margin of safety. Despite high financial strength and profitability (GF Score™ 80/100), its current P/E of 14.8x is well below its historical median, suggesting potential for growth. There have been no insider transactions in the last three months, which implies a stable outlook from company executives.

feed.title: Operating margin % of Voyager Technologies, Inc. Class A – GETTEX:A41ADA
feed.summary: This article displays the operating margin percentage for Voyager Technologies, Inc. Class A, traded on GETTEX under the symbol A41ADA. It appears to be a financial data page from TradingView, providing financial metrics for the company.

feed.title: DaVita Inc (DVA) Shares Fall 3.3% -- What GF Score of 92 Tells Investors
feed.summary: DaVita Inc (DVA) shares recently fell 3.3% but are considered "Modestly Undervalued" by GuruFocus, with a GF Value™ of $161.62 against a current price of $144.57. The company boasts a strong GF Score™ of 92/100, driven by high profitability and growth, yet shows weakness in financial strength and significant insider selling. Investors are advised to weigh these factors before making decisions.

feed.title: Insider Sell: Thomas Indelicarto Sells Shares of VeriSign Inc (VRSN)
feed.summary: Thomas Indelicarto, EVP, General Counsel & Secretary of VeriSign Inc, sold 498 shares of the company on April 14, 2026, reducing his total holdings to 38,202.258 shares. VeriSign Inc (VRSN) is currently trading at $270.06, which is considered fairly valued according to its GuruFocus Value of $261.19. The company's P/E ratio of 31.24 is higher than the industry median and its own historical median.

feed.title: Insider Sell: John Laughter Sells 15,000 Shares of Delta Air Lin
feed.summary: John Laughter, Executive Vice President & Chief of Operations at Delta Air Lines Inc (DAL), sold 15,000 shares of the company on April 14, 2026. This transaction continues a trend of insider selling at Delta, with no insider buys and 24 sells over the past year. With a trading price of $71.61 and a GF Value of $53.22, the stock appears to be significantly overvalued.

feed.title: MGM Resorts International (MGM) Stock Up 4.4% and Still Underval
feed.summary: MGM Resorts International's stock increased by 4.4% to $38.36, and GuruFocus's GF Value™ indicates it is 22.9% undervalued with an intrinsic value of $49.74. The company holds a strong GF Score™ of 84/100, driven by high scores in Growth, Valuation, and Momentum, despite a lower Financial Strength rating. Significant insider buying activity, totaling $37.2 million in the last three months, reinforces confidence in the company's future.

feed.title: Jury finds that Ticketmaster and Live Nation had an anticompetitive monopoly over big concert venues
feed.summary: A federal jury in Manhattan has found that Live Nation and its subsidiary Ticketmaster hold a harmful, anticompetitive monopoly over major concert venues in the U.S. This decision marks a significant loss for the entertainment giant in a lawsuit brought by dozens of U.S. states and the District of Columbia. The verdict could result in hundreds of millions of dollars in penalties and potentially require the divestiture of some Live Nation entities, as the jury found Ticketmaster overcharged consumers.

feed.title: Virco MFG executive Virtue buys shares worth $97k By Investing.com
feed.summary: Virco MFG Executive Vice President Douglas A. Virtue recently purchased 16,027 shares of the company's common stock in two transactions totaling $97,517. These purchases, made on April 14 and April 15, 2026, increased his direct ownership to 877,866 shares and align with an InvestingPro Tip about aggressive management share buybacks. The company, currently trading at $6.09, is considered undervalued by InvestingPro Fair Value analysis, despite a recent revenue and earnings decline attributed to the absence of non-recurring disaster recovery orders from the previous fiscal year.

feed.title: Duke Energy seeks price increase in North Carolina to recoup winter power costs
feed.summary: Duke Energy is seeking approval from North Carolina regulators to raise electricity prices to recover over $800 million in higher fuel and power purchase costs from an extreme winter cold snap. If approved, monthly bills for Duke Energy Carolinas and Duke Energy Progress customers would increase by approximately $6.90 and $7.88, respectively, starting June 1. The company proposes spreading the recovery over 19 months to lessen the immediate financial impact on customers.

feed.title: Lockheed Martin (LMT) Secures $850.41M Contract Modification for TRIDENT II Program
feed.summary: Lockheed Martin Space has secured an $850.41 million contract modification for the TRIDENT II (D5) Life Extension 2 program, reinforcing its role in the U.S. Navy's strategic capabilities. The company, the world's largest defense contractor, has a GF Score™ of 89/100, indicating strong long-term potential despite a premium P/E ratio and recent insider selling activity. Investors should consider these factors when evaluating LMT.

feed.title: VUG ETF Gains 1.9%
feed.summary: The VUG ETF (Vanguard Growth ETF) experienced a gain of 1.9%. This brief article likely reports on its daily performance.

feed.title: abrdn National Municipal Income Fund (VFL) Announces Removal of Non-Fundamental Investment Policy Restricting Investments in High-Yield Municipal Securities
feed.summary: abrdn National Municipal Income Fund (VFL) has announced the removal of a non-fundamental investment policy that previously restricted its investments in high-yield municipal securities to a maximum of 20% of its portfolio, effective June 1, 2026. This change aims to expand diversification, potentially increase earnings and distributions, and improve long-term, risk-adjusted returns for shareholders, despite a modest increase in credit risk. The fund expects to initially increase its exposure to high-yield securities to approximately 30% and potentially up to 50% over time, depending on market conditions.

feed.title: abrdn National Municipal Income Fund Removes High-Yield Investment Restriction
feed.summary: The abrdn National Municipal Income Fund (NYSE: VFL) has removed its investment policy restricting high-yield municipal securities to 20% of its portfolio, effective June 1, 2026. This change allows the fund to target an initial 30% allocation to high-yield bonds, potentially increasing to 50% over time. The move aims to increase diversification and shareholder earnings, though it introduces higher credit risk.

feed.title: Abrdn National Municipal Income Fund (VFL) announces adjournment of special shareholder meeting relating to proposed reorganization
feed.summary: Abrdn National Municipal Income Fund (VFL) has announced the adjournment of a special shareholder meeting concerning a proposed reorganization. This announcement was made on April 15, 2026, and follows other recent news from the fund, including the removal of a policy restricting investments in high-yield municipal securities and several monthly dividend declarations. The fund aims to provide current income exempt from federal income tax by investing primarily in municipal bonds.

feed.title: abrdn National Municipal Income Fund (VFL) Announces Adjournment of Special Shareholder Meeting Relating to Proposed Reorganization
feed.summary: The abrdn National Municipal Income Fund (VFL) announced the adjournment of its Special Meeting of Shareholders to May 6, 2026, at 11:00 am ET. This adjournment is to gather additional proxies for a proposed reorganization with MFS Municipal Income Trust (MFM). The Board of Trustees unanimously recommends shareholders vote in favor of the reorganization.

feed.title: abrdn municipal fund opens door to riskier debt, targets up to 50%
feed.summary: The abrdn National Municipal Income Fund (VFL) has removed a non-fundamental policy limiting investments in high-yield municipal securities to 20%, effective June 1, 2026. This change allows VFL to increase its high-yield exposure in stages, targeting approximately 30% initially and 30-50% over time, to potentially enhance diversification, earnings, and distributions, despite an expected increase in credit risk. The Board believes this broader mandate will better serve shareholders and improve long-term, risk-adjusted returns.

feed.title: [SCHEDULE 13G] Ocugen, Inc. Passive Investment Disclosure (>5%)
feed.summary: Millennium Management LLC, Millennium Group Management LLC, and Israel A. Englander have filed a Schedule 13G disclosing their shared beneficial ownership of 17,074,584 shares of Ocugen, Inc. common stock, representing 5.2% of the class. The filing indicates shared voting and dispositive power over these shares. The Schedule 13G was signed on April 13, 2026, and lists the CUSIP number as 67577C105.

feed.title: Voyager Technologies, Inc. Class A Revenue Breakdown – GETTEX:A41ADA
feed.summary: Voyager Technologies, Inc. Class A (GETTEX:A41ADA) generated 141.69 million EUR last year, with its Defense and National Security segment contributing 104.69 million EUR. The United States was the primary revenue source, accounting for 128.48 million EUR.

feed.title: Insider Selling: Vor Biopharma (NASDAQ:VOR) Director Sells 153,735 Shares of Stock
feed.summary: Ra Capital Management, L.P., a director at Vor Biopharma (NASDAQ:VOR), sold 153,735 shares of the company's stock on April 14th at an average price of $15.97, totaling approximately $2.46 million. This sale is part of several disposals made by the firm in April, amounting to about $28.1 million and reducing their stake by 4.51% to 3,251,263 shares. Despite the insider selling, analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating for Vor Biopharma with an average price target of $50.56.

feed.title: Why VF Corp (VFC) Stock Is Trading Up Today
feed.summary: Shares of VF Corp (VFC) jumped 4.6% today following upbeat March retail sales data that indicated resilient consumer spending, with U.S. clothing and accessories stores seeing a 0.57% month-over-month increase. This positive market sentiment was further bolstered by peer AEO's successful advertising campaign with actress Sydney Sweeney, which had previously correlated with a 77% rise in AEO's shares. Although VF Corp's stock experienced a significant intraday gain, its historical performance over the last five years shows a substantial decline for long-term investors.

feed.title: Bioventus (BVS) CFO exercises 13,000 RSUs and withholds 5,648 shares for tax
feed.summary: Bioventus Inc.'s Senior Vice President and CFO, Mark Leonard Singleton, exercised 13,000 restricted stock units (RSUs) on April 10, 2026, receiving an equal number of Class A shares. To cover tax obligations, 5,648 Class A shares were withheld at a price of $9.06 per share in a non-market transaction. Following these transactions, Singleton directly owns 182,981 Class A shares, indicating a net increase in his equity position.

feed.title: Evotec Nominates Dieter Weinand as Supervisory Board Chairman
feed.summary: Evotec SE has announced the nomination of Dieter Weinand as the Chairman of its Supervisory Board, with his election proposed for the June 11, 2026, Annual General Meeting. This move is part of Evotec's strategy to strengthen commercial execution, strategic partnerships, and long-term value creation, as Weinand brings extensive experience from the global pharmaceutical industry. He is set to succeed Prof. Dr. Iris Löw-Friedrich, and his leadership is expected to be instrumental in transforming Evotec into a more efficient and profitable company.

feed.title: NRG Stadium, the home of the Houston Texans and rodeo, renamed to Reliant Stadium in August 2026, company announces
feed.summary: NRG Stadium, home to the Houston Texans and the annual rodeo, will revert to its original name, Reliant Stadium, in August 2026. NRG Energy, Inc. announced the change, stating that the surrounding facilities at NRG Park will also become Reliant Park. This renaming acknowledges the stadium's original identity from 2002 before it was changed to NRG in 2014, reflecting public sentiment that it has always been Reliant Stadium.

feed.title: FirstEnergy Corp. stock (US3377381088): Is regulatory recovery now the real test for utility investo
feed.summary: FirstEnergy Corp. is at a critical juncture, navigating stricter regulations and energy transition pressures. The company's post-scandal turnaround, focusing on governance reforms and grid modernization, makes it a compelling case study for investors. The article explores whether this recovery positions the stock for steady dividends and growth amid rising energy demands, particularly with its pure-play transmission and distribution model.

feed.title: Johnson Controls stock rises on report of $4.5 billion divestiture plans
feed.summary: Johnson Controls International Plc is reportedly considering selling two businesses within its security division, potentially valued at up to $4.5 billion. The company is seeking interest for its Access Control and Intrusion Detection units, which could be sold separately or to a single buyer. Following this news, Johnson Controls stock rose by 1.6% in after-hours trading, despite a 3.4% decline during regular trading hours.

feed.title: $320M Upstart loan bond deal gets preliminary KBRA ratings
feed.summary: KBRA has assigned preliminary ratings to Upstart Securitization Trust 2026-2, a $320.14 million consumer loan ABS securitization backed by unsecured and auto-secured personal loans. This marks Upstart's 50th ABS securitization, with credit enhancement levels ranging from 20.50% to 66.05% for different note classes. The collateral pool for UPST 2026-2 includes approximately $400.2 million in loans, with auto-secured personal loans making up about 5% of the total.
